items.title: Wrote about De’Aaron Fox, and three things we know:
items.author: Mike Finger
items.body_excerpt:
Wrote about De’Aaron Fox, and three things we know:

1. The Spurs’ trade for him was good, and they’d do it over again.

2. They wouldn’t have made the Finals without him.

3. They will have to move on from him eventually, and it might be this summer.

www.expressnews.com/sports/spurs...

media.title: Why the Spurs might face a big decision with De’Aaron Fox this summer
media.description: Like many other teams that make a leap like the Spurs just did, they’re going to have to make some big decisions regarding their allocation of resources.

items.title: I know it's not exactly a novel thought, but the thing I keep coming back to that makes this — and most of his stuff — sound different is that a lot of politicians sound like they're trying to make you believe they love the place. He just honestly can't wait to tell you how much
items.author: Dan Devine
items.body_excerpt: I know it's not exactly a novel thought, but the thing I keep coming back to that makes this — and most of his stuff — sound different is that a lot of politicians sound like they're trying to make you believe they love the place. He just honestly can't wait to tell you how much he loves the place.
